Versions of external components
-------------------------------

This file lists versions of the external components we are using.

- POCO: 1.15.1
- boost: 1.88.0
- frhed: 0.10904.2017.22
- WinIMerge: 1.0.52.0
  - freeimage: 3.19.10 (https://github.com/danoli3/FreeImage)
  - LibXDiff: 611e42a on Nov 2, 2018 (https://github.com/git/git/tree/master/xdiff)
- WinWebDiff: 1.0.20.0
  - WebView2: 1.0.1518.46
  - wil: 1.0.191107.2
  - rapidjson: 1.1.1
- Google C++ Testing Framework: 1.14.0
- GNU patch: 2.7.6-1
- 7-zip: 26.01
- LibXDiff: 611e42a on Nov 2, 2018 (https://github.com/git/git/tree/master/xdiff)
- html-tidy5: 5.4.0
- jq: 1.8.1
- wil: 209ff9c7e30e71bf6d1405557bf78544920f8157 on Sep 9, 2021
- md4c: 0.5.2
- cliphcat: 0.3.0
- darkmodelib: 0.21.2.0
- StackWalker: 7af4024 on Aug 4, 2025 (https://github.com/JochenKalmbach/StackWalker)
- tree-sitter: 0.25.10 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter)
  - tree-sitter-fsharp:      0.3.0  (https://github.com/ionide/tree-istter-fsharp)
  - tree-sitter-c:          v0.24.1 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-c)
  - tree-sitter-cpp:        v0.23.4 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-cpp)
  - tree-sitter-c-sharp:    v0.23.1 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-c-sharp)
  - tree-sitter-python:     v0.25.0 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-python)
  - tree-sitter-javascript: v0.25.0 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-javascript)
  - tree-sitter-typescript: v0.23.2 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-typescript)
  - tree-sitter-java:       v0.23.5 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-java)
  - tree-sitter-go:         v0.25.0 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-go)
  - tree-sitter-rust:       v0.24.1 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-rust)
  - tree-sitter-json:       v0.24.8 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-json)
  - tree-sitter-html:       v0.23.2 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-html)
  - tree-sitter-css:        v0.25.0 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-css)
  - tree-sitter-bash:       v0.25.1 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-bash)
  - tree-sitter-ruby:       v0.23.1 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-ruby)
  - tree-sitter-php:        v0.24.2 (https://github.com/tree-sitter/tree-sitter-php)
  - tree-sitter-xml:        v0.7.0  (https://github.com/tree-sitter-grammars/tree-sitter-xml)
